signals.npcLine: Whispers of fragile credits, the market shivers under silent pressure.
signals.questPulse: Crypto nodes flicker; stabilize or watch assets destabilize.
signals.worldFeed: Global market cap hums slight gain amid rising tension.
signals.clueEvent: Glitches spike in low-tier currencies, danger lurks in noise.

signals.npcLine: Eyes on the asteroids — anomalous data flow detected.
signals.questPulse: Intercept incoming transmissions from asteroid sector; decode urgency.
signals.worldFeed: New assets emerge, shifting balances in shadow exchanges.
signals.clueEvent: Unstable asset signatures hint at covert operator moves.

signals.npcLine: Rave networks pulse erratically, signaling unrest beneath the grid.
signals.questPulse: Trace signal burst; potential key to hidden vault access.
signals.worldFeed: Subcurrents buzz with rumors of frozen funds and stealth trades.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted chatter spikes around zeroed tokens; decrypt for insight.

signals.npcLine: Pengu vanguards calling for recruits; secrets buried in ice.
signals.questPulse: Track down missing data caches before rival gangs do.
signals.worldFeed: Frigid sectors show strange activity; uncover what's beneath.
signals.clueEvent: Silent footprints traced on frozen networks, follow the trail.

signals.npcLine: Fear grips the streets; trust no whisper, trust no shadow.
signals.questPulse: Help gather intel on rising dread; hope flickers weak.
signals.worldFeed: Sentiment sensors hit low; tensions rise in neon alleys.
signals.clueEvent: Sparse signals hint at imminent crackdowns in dark sectors.
